goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'particular hotel'. Its name is called 'worth house'.
Make sure you get 'star of the hotel'.
You are also looking for a 'restaurant'. The restaurant should be in the 'expensive' price range and should be in the 'south'.
Once you find the 'restaurant' you want to book a table for '1 people' at '11:15' on 'tuesday'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a particular hotel. Its name is called worth house
Make sure you get star of the hotel
You are also looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should be in the expensive price range and should be in the south
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 1 people at 11:15 on tuesday
Make sure you get the reference number
